relations.subject: Papyrus gonolek
relations.evidence: It is found in Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Rwanda, Tanzania, and Uganda. It has specialised habitat requirements, being restricted to papyrus swamps

relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Papyrus gonolek
relations.evidence: Not yet a threatened species, it has become rare due to habitat loss and pollution
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Papyrus gonolek
relations.evidence: Not yet a threatened species, it has become rare due to habitat loss and pollution
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: Papyrus gonolek
relations.evidence: It is vulnerable to such threats as drainage of wetlands, burning and pollution caused by run-off from agricultural land
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
